testcase.name: test_tenant_has_parking_field

failure.message: AssertionError: assert ('has_parking' in {'created_at': '2026-03-02T19:22:58.445411+00:00', 'deposit_amount': None, 'deposit_date': None, 'email': 'ahe', ...} or None is not None or None == False) + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff6e2b4acf40>('has_parking') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff6e2b4acf40> = {'created_at': '2026-03-02T19:22:58.445411+00:00', 'deposit_amount': None, 'deposit_date': None, 'email': 'ahe', ...}.get + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff6e2b4acf40>('has_parking') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff6e2b4acf40> = {'created_at': '2026-03-02T19:22:58.445411+00:00', 'deposit_amount': None, 'deposit_date': None, 'email': 'ahe', ...}.get

testcase.failure: tests/test_batch2_features.py:110: in test_tenant_has_parking_field assert 'has_parking' in first_tenant or first_tenant.get('has_parking') is not None or first_tenant.get('has_parking') == False E AssertionError: assert ('has_parking' in {'created_at': '2026-03-02T19:22:58.445411+00:00', 'deposit_amount': None, 'deposit_date': None, 'email': 'ahe', ...} or None is not None or None == False) E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff6e2b4acf40>('has_parking') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff6e2b4acf40> = {'created_at': '2026-03-02T19:22:58.445411+00:00', 'deposit_amount': None, 'deposit_date': None, 'email': 'ahe', ...}.get E + and None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff6e2b4acf40>('has_parking') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xff6e2b4acf40> = {'created_at': '2026-03-02T19:22:58.445411+00:00', 'deposit_amount': None, 'deposit_date': None, 'email': 'ahe', ...}.get
